title: narcissus × fosteri subsp. ernii
intro: Narcissus × fosteri subsp. ernii is a sub-species of the Narcissus × fosteri plant, commonly known as the Foster's narcissus or Foster's jonquil. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues and fever. The health benefits of Narcissus × fosteri subsp. ernii include its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. The plant is often prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is traditionally used to make teas and tonics that promote overall well-being and respiratory health.
